title: Changeling (Melodie)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''Changeling''' was a [[Melodie]] whom was undergoing the [[Changing Ceremony]], an event that occurred on the twentieth year of a Melodie's life. This event involved being immersed in a special pool covered by a blue-green algae which created oxygen through photosynthesis for the Changelings to breathe.

This marked the change from land-dweller to water-breather. The process could take weeks, and the Melodie was vulnerable to attacks from [[Yavin 8/Legends|Yavin 8's]] other predators. The Ceremony was concluded when the gill slits and tail slits of the Changelings were formed, making them adult Melodies, also known as [[Elder (Melodie)|Elders]], and allowing them to live entirely underwater.

==Appearances==
*''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Lyric's World]]'' {{1st}}
